manifest.name: Dashboard Hub

name: Dashboard Hub

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release adds a dedicated Workflow launcher and improves optional AI integration documentation.

### Highlights

  - Added Workflows to the standalone tool launcher.
  - Browse and run workflows directly without creating a dashboard.
  - Display workflow output as rendered Markdown.
  - Added execution progress, error handling, cancellation, and empty-state feedback.
  - Added an “Open workflow” command when a connected plugin provides workflow support.
  - Improved the workflow refresh interval input.
  - Documented optional AI integrations with Gemini Helper, Local LLM Hub, and LLM Hub.
  - Updated English and Japanese interface text.

  ### Requirements

Workflow execution requires a compatible connected plugin, such as [Gemini Helper](https://github.com/takeshy/obsidian-gemini-helper), [Local LLM Hub](https://github.com/takeshy/obsidian-local-llm-hub), or [LLM Hub](https://github.com/takeshy/obsidian-llm-hub). Dashboard Hub’s  non-AI features remain fully usable without one.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: feat: improve document reading position and memo interactions

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed bundled dynamic <script> element creation by switching to React 18.3.1.
  - Updated React type definitions and iframe ref compatibility.
  - Improved compliance with Obsidian Community Plugin security requirements.
  - No user-facing functionality has changed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Open .kanban files directly as interactive Kanban boards.
  - Edit board columns, filters, display fields, and other settings with automatic saving.
  - Added movable floating widget controls for maximize, settings, and widget movement.
  - Moved the memo button to the left side of file widget headers.
  - Removed the widget deletion confirmation; deleted widgets can be restored with Undo.
  - Hide Workflow widgets when no compatible AI integration is available.
  - Fixed Timeline freezes when opening EPUB links.
  - Improved PDF viewing, text selection, continuous scrolling, and memo highlight interactions.
  - Added memo hover previews and click-to-open behavior for PDF, Markdown, and EPUB content.
  - Fixed EPUB internal links that could display a blank page.
  - Improved Obsidian API compatibility and resolved community-plugin lint warnings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Replaced direct vault.adapter access with Obsidian’s public Vault API
  - Updated the settings heading to follow Obsidian’s recommended API
